title: Workstation Hardware Profile
description: Local development and primary compute workstation for the SuperInstance/LAU stack

cpu.notes: Hybrid architecture: 4x Zen 5 + 8x Zen 5c. AVX-512 support is partial — check specific intrinsics.

discreteGPU.notes: Mobile RTX 4050 — 6GB VRAM is the primary constraint. Use mixed precision and gradient checkpointing for training.

memory.notes: Soldered — not upgradeable. Shared with integrated GPU (UMA).

storage.notes: Single M.2 slot. External storage recommended for datasets.

network.notes: Wi-Fi 7 provides excellent throughput. For sustained transfers, use USB-C ethernet adapter.

software.kubernetes: minikube or k3s for local testing

performanceProfile.notes: Approximate benchmarks. Run scripts/benchmark.sh for actual measurements.

profile.deploymentRole: Primary development machine. Local testing, cross-compilation source, Docker image builds. NOT a production deployment target.
